name: Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 1½-quart casserole dish with vegetable oil coating.
3. Peel potatoes and slice crosswise into 1/8-inch slices. If large, cut slices in half.
4. Mix together flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Place half of the sliced potatoes in the prepared casserole dish.
6. Dot with half of the margarine, sprinkle half of the seasoned flour on top, then half of the chopped onion.
7. Repeat with remaining potatoes, margarine, seasoned flour, and onion.
8. Pour enough hot water into one corner so that it barely covers the potatoes.
9. Cover and bake for 50 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake for another 25-30 minutes or until potatoes are browned and tender.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE CHO: 17g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 5g; CAL 117
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use unsalted margarine.
